page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EDCI656 or TLPL616.

Formerly: EDCI656.

TLPL617 Understanding and Engaging Students’ Conceptions of Mathematics (3 Credits)

Research related to K-14 students’ common errors in and (mis)understandings of mathematics. Instructional strategies useful in building on errors and changing students’ conceptions.

Prerequisite: Experience in teaching math; or permission of EDUC- Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department.
